visual_description: A man in a brown suit rides a bicycle with a basket of produce along a rural road under a blue sky. The camera then shows the back of a white pickup truck with open cages containing animals traveling on the same road. Finally, the man on the bicycle passes the truck, and the view shifts to the interior where the cages are visible.
audio_description: The audio includes the sound of a bicycle moving on pavement and the low rumble of a truck engine. No speech is audible.
